commit_scope: Release audit evidence cells into dynamic Form loading and fresh native cache reads

commands: git diff --check -- Makefile form/form-stdlib/audit-evidence-cells.fk form/form-stdlib/queries/audit-evidence-tending.fk form/form-stdlib/queries/audit-evidence-index-cache.fk form/form-stdlib/tests/audit-evidence-cells-band.fk form/form-stdlib/tests/audit-evidence-index-cache-band.fk form/form-stdlib/blueprint-registry.json form/form-kernel-go/bp_table.go form/form-kernel-rust/src/bp_table.rs form/form-kernel-ts/src/bp_table.ts docs/shared/agent-start-packet.md docs/system_audit/commit_evidence_2026-06-07_audit_evidence_cells.json
local_validation.summary: The audit evidence cell query returned [65402, system-audit-evidence, 662, 615, 597, 615, 3458, 6823, persist dynamic commit evidence cell index and compress repeated proof fields]. The proof band returned 1023, proving that dynamic loading finds a known real commit evidence JSON by source path, preserves date/scope/status/phase-held fields, and summarizes the full commit_evidence_*.json surface with pass and phase-held attribution. The cache target returned write after this evidence file changed, then fresh on the next run with source_count=615 after comparing the cache mtime with the newest commit_evidence_*.json mtime. The cache band returned 1023 after reading the .fkb artifact back and finding the known evidence recipe by source path.

known_failed_attempts.output: The first freshness patch returned 0 because one stale-branch close paren ended the audit-evidence-cells.fk do-body early. Balance was restored and the cache target returned a cache-result list.

ci_validation.reason: No commit or PR created in this turn.

deploy_validation.reason: Local Form-kernel source query only; no deployment was performed.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed, but no CI or deployment validation ran in this turn.

evidence_refs: json-lens-tending selected system-audit-evidence as the hottest JSON surface.
audit-evidence-cells.fk defines a durable Form cell over the repeated commit evidence schema.
audit-evidence-cells.fk dynamically loads docs/system_audit/commit_evidence_*.json rows from source_inventory.
audit-evidence-cells-band proves dynamic loading by finding a known real commit evidence JSON as a Form cell.
audit-evidence-index-cache.fk now ensures the .fkb index with a Form freshness check over commit_evidence_*.json mtimes.
audit-evidence-index-cache-band proves the warm cache path returns fresh and still contains that known evidence cell as a recipe.
AEC-EVIDENCE-CELL and AEC-EVIDENCE-INDEX are registered blueprints with regenerated Go/Rust/TypeScript bp tables.
